ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Full name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Internal course code */,
  "cricos_code" TEXT /* CRICOS code for international students */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in years */,
  "intake" TEXT /* Intake periods for the course */,
  "fees_2020" REAL /* Indicative fees for the year 2020 */,
  "campus" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the course is offered */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "prerequisite_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the course has prerequisites */,
  "corequisite_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the course has corequisites */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the course details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_campus FOREIGN KEY ("campus") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the program belongs to */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program or specialization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  "corequisite_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the program has corequisites */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the program details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_programs_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the campus */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the campus */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the campus can accommodate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the campus details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intakes" (
  "intake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intake period */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the intake period belongs to */,
  "intake_name" TEXT /* Name of the intake period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intake period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intake period */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the intake can accommodate */,
  "enrollment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for enrollment */,
  "enrollment_end_date" TEXT /* End date for enrollment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the intake details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intakes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the fee belongs to */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the fee is applicable */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of the fee (e.g., tuition, lab, etc.) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the fee details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_fees_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of enrollment (e.g., enrolled, completed) */,
  "intake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intake period */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the enrollment details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_intake_id FOREIGN KEY ("intake_id") REFERENCES intakes ("intake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus the student belongs to */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_year" TEXT /* Year the student enrolled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the student details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES course_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has the prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "corequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corequisite course */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the prerequisite details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_corequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("corequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the resource is allocated to */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the resource is allocated to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the resource details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
